style_a.name: 港片复古胶片
style_a.prompt_suffix: Wong Kar-wai style, high contrast, heavy film grain, red and green neon glow, warm yellow tones, anamorphic lens, claustrophobic framing, Hong Kong retro 1990s aesthetic

style_b.name: 茶山奇幻古风
style_b.prompt_suffix: lush green tea mountain, ethereal mist, golden sunrise, traditional Chinese fantasy, flowing hanfu robes, vibrant saturated colors, epic aerial landscape, dreamy oriental mythology

music_sync.lyrics: [Bridge to Outro] 在最高处长啸 让天地都听见 / X-WOW 刻入星空的名字

atmosphere.overall_mood: 茶山最高处古亭仰天长啸——天空出现巨大X-WOW数字图腾——镜头快速拉远穿透云层回到港风现实
atmosphere.lighting: 金色夕阳+古亭火光→穿越回港风霓虹
atmosphere.weather: 茶山黄昏→穿越云层→港风深夜

video_prompt: White-robed warrior standing in an ancient mountain pavilion crying out to the heavens, massive glowing X-WOW digital totem appearing in the sky, then rapid pullback through clouds transitioning back to Hong Kong neon reality, 16:9, 15s.

bgm.description: 桥段到尾声——从壮丽渐入温挡安静
bgm.instruments: 管弦乐渐弱、中国笛子独奏、电子氛围音

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 全景——茶山最高峰上的六角形古亭，夕阳金光照耀，云海在亭下翻腾
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 茶山之巅的最高点——古亭如王座
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 高山风声、远处云海翻涌声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Majestic wide shot of an ancient hexagonal Chinese pavilion perched on the highest tea mountain peak, golden sunset light bathing the structure, a sea of clouds churning below the peak, a white-robed figure standing in the center of the pavilion, epic mountain-top throne of solitude, Chinese fantasy landscape, vibrant gold and green sunset colors, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 中景——创作者B站在古亭檐下，夕阳金光从背后照入，面部半在阴影中
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 暴风雨前的宁静——长啸前的最后沉默
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Medium shot of a white-robed warrior standing beneath the curved eaves of an ancient Chinese pavilion, golden sunset backlight streaming in from behind, his face half in shadow and half illuminated, taking a deep breath preparing to shout, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, Chinese fantasy intimate hero portrait, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 近景——创作者B仰天长啸！张大嘴巴，声波可视化地从口中扩散，挤压周围的空气
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 长啸释放——所有压抑在这一刻全部爆发
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 震天长啸声、声波扩散可视化音效
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Close-up of a white-robed warrior throwing his head back and releasing a mighty shout to the heavens, visible sound waves rippling outward from his open mouth, the air distorting around his cry, golden sunset light on his face, veins on neck visible with effort, raw emotional catharsis at the mountain peak, Chinese fantasy primal scream, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 远景——长啸的声波冲击云海，云层被声波推开形成巨大的圆形缺口
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 云层被推开的壮观声响
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Aerial shot showing the ancient pavilion on the peak as a massive visible shockwave from the warrior's shout pushes the cloud sea apart, creating an enormous circular clearing in the clouds around the mountain top, the shockwave expanding outward, epic display of raw power, Chinese fantasy sound-wave visual effect, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 被推开的云层缺口中——天空出现巨大的X-WOW金色数字图腾，由光和代码构成，如星座般悬在苍穹
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: X-WOW图腾出现在天空——传奇被刻入星空
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 宏大的合成器chord、星光闪烁声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Looking up at the sky above tea mountains where a massive glowing X-WOW logo constellation has appeared among the clouds, composed of golden code characters and light particles arranged in the pattern of a Chinese mythological totem, the text floating magnificently against the dark golden sunset sky, clouds parted around it, a legendary mark in the heavens, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 仰视古亭——创作者B仰望天空中的X-WOW图腾，微笑，金色图腾的光映在他脸上
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 目视自己的传奇——心满意足
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Low angle portrait of the white-robed warrior looking up at the sky with a peaceful smile, golden X-WOW totem light reflected on his upturned face, ancient pavilion roof framing the top of the shot, the moment of fulfilled destiny, serene satisfied expression, Chinese fantasy hero at peace, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 镜头开始快速拉远——从古亭缩小到茶山全景，速度越来越快，X-WOW图腾在天空中渐隐
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 快速离开——从茶山世界抽离
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 加速的风声、空间压缩声
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: Ultra-rapid aerial pullback from the ancient pavilion on the mountain peak, the view zooming out at incredible speed showing the full tea mountain landscape shrinking rapidly, the golden X-WOW totem fading in the sky, the world getting smaller and smaller, a visual speed retreat from the fantasy realm, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 穿越云层回归——镜头从茶山空中穿入云海，快速穿透灰白色云层，光线从翠绿金色变为冷调
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 反向穿越——从幻境回到现实
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: First-person POV diving downward through clouds, the light shifting from golden-green fantasy tones to cool gray-blue real-world tones, the cloud texture changing, a reverse of the earlier ascent, the journey back to reality, color temperature cooling rapidly, transitional atmospheric flight, 16:9 aspect ratio

storyboard_9grid.scene_description: 穿破云底——眼前出现的不再是茶山而是密密麻麻的港风建筑群和霓虹灯，镜头俯冲向一扇亮着CRT绿光的窗户
storyboard_9grid.atmosphere: 现实回归——港风建筑群中那一扇窗
storyboard_9grid.sfx: 霓虹灯嗡鸣骤然回归、城市噪音
storyboard_9grid.ai_image_prompt: First-person POV breaking through cloud bottom to see a dense Hong Kong cityscape of old apartment buildings and neon signs far below, rapidly diving downward toward one specific apartment window glowing with familiar green CRT light, the fantasy world completely replaced by neon-lit urban reality, returning home, Wong Kar-wai aerial approach, film grain, 16:9 aspect ratio
